title: SongSkippedEvent
description: Published by Streaming Service when a user skips a song. Consumed by Analytics and Recommendation services.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID v4). Used as idempotency key. Redis key: analytics:idempotency:{event_id} or rec:idempotency:{event_id}, TTL 24h.

version.description: Schema version. Always 'v1' for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of when the skip event was generated (e.g. 2026-04-15T14:37:22.891Z).

correlation_id.description: Distributed tracing ID propagated from the originating HTTP request.

user_id.description: Anonymized user identifier (UUID v4). MUST NOT contain PII (no email, name, phone).

song_id.description: UUID of the song that was skipped.

artist_id.description: UUID of the song's primary artist.

genre_id.description: UUID of the song's primary genre. Used for weight penalty in Recommendation Service.

skip_at_sec.description: The second (playback position) at which the skip was triggered.

duration_percent.description: How far the user got through the song (skip_at_sec / duration_sec * 100). < 30 triggers weight penalty (-0.2) in Recommendation Service.

skip_trigger.description: How the skip was triggered. Optional — 'auto_skip' is reserved for future use.

context.description: Time-of-day context when recommendation was served. Optional.

platform.description: Client platform. Currently only 'web' is supported in Phase 1.
